name: Harikrishnan N
title: Trust & Safety Quality Analyst | Automation & Data Systems
summary: Analyst having 4+ years of experience driving risk detections, enforcement quality, and decision-making at scale in high volume content ecosystems. Proven ability to work under ambiguity, design automated integrity systems, and translate complex datasets into actionable insights. Strong background in SQL-based analytics, Python automation, and audit intelligence supporting millions of records and hundreds of users.

experience.company: Amazon Prime Video Trust and Safety

categories.name: Risk Detection, Audit Intelligence & Enforcement Quality
bullets: Redesigned quality sampling and enforcement validation logic across 11 workflows, increasing detection of critical defects by 30% and strengthening audit confidence in high-volume review pipelines.
Conducted deep root-cause analyses on false-positive and false-negative enforcement signals, directly improving sampling accuracy and decision reliability.
Supported regulatory and compliance data requests across 3 global teams, ensuring accurate, traceable evidence under strict governance requirements.

categories.name: Agent-Based Automation & Compliance Systems
bullets: Designed and built an end-to-end agent-based automation system to replace manual Walk the Store compliance audits on the Prime Video storefront.
Automated storefront navigation, title discovery, and playback simulation to detect on-screen maturity rating and content descriptor (MRN/CD) overlays in real time.
Implemented screenshot capture and cloud-based processing to convert visual compliance signals into structured text evidence.
Cross-validated extracted MRN/CD signals against internal audit systems to automatically determine pass/fail outcomes.
Flagged mismatches, missing signals, and incorrect ratings for targeted root-cause investigation, eliminating repetitive manual reviews and improving detection reliability.
Enabled auditors to focus on exception analysis and enforcement accuracy rather than routine navigation tasks.

categories.name: Analytics, Decision Support & Stakeholder Influence
bullets: Built centralized, self-serve quality dashboards used by 20+ managers, reducing reporting overhead and enabling faster risk-based decision-making.
Partnered with global stakeholders to explain enforcement anomalies, performance trends, and audit outcomes using data-backed narratives.
Translated complex SQL analyses into executive-ready insights influencing prioritization of quality and integrity initiatives.

categories.name: Automation & Scalable Intelligence
bullets: Developed Python-based analytics and monitoring tools used by 300+ employees, improving real-time visibility into data health and operational risks.
Automated detection of pipeline failures and data inconsistencies, saving approximately 2 analyst-hours daily and improving responsiveness.
Prototyped LLM-powered analytical tooling to generate Weekly Business Review insights directly from source tables, reducing dashboard dependency and accelerating leadership consumption of insights.

experience.company: Amazon Prime Video Trust and Safety
bullets: Conducted content analysis and classification with 98% productivity keeping 100% quality.
Managed sensitive corporate data in secure environment with strict governance protocols.
Collaborated with 40+ team members on data collection, validation, and weekly reporting.
Produced daily MIS reports for senior leadership by analyzing operational, inventory, and sales datasets.
Managed SAP-based operations including vendor liabilities, inventory reconciliation, and stock transfer analysis.
Prepared statutory TDS and TCS returns, ensuring audit readiness and regulatory compliances.

projects.title: Agent-Based Storefront Compliance Automation
projects.problem: Manual storefront audits were slow, inconsistent, and prone to missed compliance gaps.
projects.action: Built a Python-based agent system to simulate human navigation, detect MR/CD overlays during playback, capture evidence, process it via cloud services, and validate signals against internal audit records.
projects.impact: Eliminated repetitive manual audits, improved reliability of storefront compliance validation, and enabled focused root-cause investigations.

projects.title: Sampling & Enforcement Signal Optimization
projects.problem: Existing sampling logic under-detected high-risk defects.
projects.action: Redesigned SQL-based detection thresholds using historical defect analysis.
projects.impact: Increased critical issue detection by 30%, strengthening enforcement confidence.
